referenceContainer.name: columns
referenceContainer.htmlClass: columns mx-auto flex w-full max-w-layout flex-wrap gap-3 px-4 py-6 sm:px-6 lg:flex-nowrap lg:gap-10 lg:px-8

container.name: div.sidebar.main
container.htmlClass: sidebar sidebar-main order-1 w-full shrink-0 lg:w-64

container.name: div.sidebar.additional
container.htmlClass: sidebar sidebar-additional order-3 w-full shrink-0 lg:order-3 lg:w-64

referenceContainer.name: main
referenceContainer.htmlClass: column main order-2 w-full min-w-0 flex-1 px-0 py-0
